title: resp variable shadowed twice in fetch_session and call
description: client.rs: in both fetch_session (lines 77-82) and call (lines 125-130), the name 'resp' is bound to the raw Response and then immediately rebound via resp.error_for_status(). The shadow means a reader must track which resp is raw vs. status-checked. Rewrite: use distinct names — raw_resp for the initial send() result and resp for the error_for_status() result, or use a single let resp = req.send().await?.error_for_status()? chain where auth checking is extracted first.
